title: Kenyan-Style Cauliflower Curry
description: A flavorful and nutritious Kenyan-inspired cauliflower curry that's easy to make and packed with spices. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger and garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the cauliflower and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the curry powder and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes or until the cauliflower is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
